name: Stick Indoor Golf
address: 487 N Main St suite b, Frankenmuth, MI 48734
about: Stick Indoor Golf provides a realistic and precise indoor golfing experience using state-of-the-art ProTee VX simulators. These devices bring the thrill of outdoor golf indoors, offering an immersive and authentic experience. Located in Frankenmuth, Michigan, the venue operates on an appointment-only basis, requiring tee times to be made at least one hour in advance. The facility offers premium golfing technology with a focus on accuracy and realistic ball flight for a quality practice session or game. Pricing is straightforward at $60 per hour, with a maximum of four golfers per bay, making it accessible for both individuals and small groups looking for a high-tech golf outing.
why_golfers_like_it: Uses the latest ProTee VX simulators with unparalleled accuracy and realistic graphics
Features over 1,200 golf courses available through the GS PRO software
Provides complimentary golf clubs for visitors who forget their own
Offers a convenient and immersive indoor golfing experience

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service on premises
No mention of alcohol service on premises

simulator_hardware.notes: Released in September 2023, features cutting-edge technology for realistic ball flight and stunning graphics

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, we provide complimentary golf clubs for all our visitors in case you forget to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention any policy regarding outside food or drinks, so it's best to contact them directly for confirmation.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required to play 18 holes is not specified on the website, as it can vary depending on the simulator software and player pace.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific information regarding child-friendly features or policies mentioned on the website.
